description: Comprehensive Elasticsearch monitoring dashboard with node metrics, cluster health, index metrics, query/request metrics, and cache metrics. Metrics sourced from OpenTelemetry Elasticsearch receiver.
title: Elasticsearch Overview (OTEL)

d1a2b3c4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890.name: deployment.environment
d1a2b3c4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'elasticsearch.node.operations.completed'
GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

e2f3a4b5-c6d7-8901-bcde-fa2345678901.name: elasticsearch.node.name
e2f3a4b5-c6d7-8901-bcde-fa2345678901.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.node.name') AS `elasticsearch.node.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'elasticsearch.node.operations.completed'
GROUP BY `elasticsearch.node.name`

f3a4b5c6-d7e8-9012-cdef-ab3456789012.name: elasticsearch.cluster.name
f3a4b5c6-d7e8-9012-cdef-ab3456789012.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.cluster.name') AS `elasticsearch.cluster.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'elasticsearch.node.operations.completed'
GROUP BY `elasticsearch.cluster.name`

widgets.description: CPU usage percentage of each Elasticsearch node
widgets.title: Node CPU Usage

widgets.description: JVM memory usage (heap + non-heap) for each node
widgets.title: Node JVM Memory Usage

widgets.description: Current heap memory usage per node
widgets.title: Node Heap Memory Usage

widgets.description: Heap utilization fraction per node
widgets.title: Node Heap Utilization

widgets.description: Total disk space across all file stores for each node
widgets.title: Node Disk Usage (Total)

widgets.description: Free (unallocated) disk space across all file stores for each node
widgets.title: Node Disk Free

widgets.description: Available disk space (to JVM) across all file stores for each node
widgets.title: Node Disk Available

widgets.description: Cluster health status: 1 = green, 2 = yellow, 3 = red
widgets.title: Cluster Health Status

widgets.description: Number of active shards in the cluster
widgets.title: Cluster Active Shards

widgets.description: Number of cluster-level changes that have not yet been executed
widgets.title: Cluster Pending Tasks

widgets.description: Number of unassigned shards in the cluster
widgets.title: Cluster Unassigned Shards

widgets.description: Total number of documents across indices
widgets.title: Index Document Count

widgets.description: Size of shards assigned to each index
widgets.title: Index Disk Usage

widgets.description: Rate of search query operations completed on indices
widgets.title: Index Search Query Rate

widgets.description: Time spent on search query operations on indices
widgets.title: Index Search Query Time

widgets.description: Rate of search operations completed per node
widgets.title: Search Request Rate

widgets.description: Time spent on search operations per node (query latency)
widgets.title: Query Latency

widgets.description: Rate of cache evictions on each node
widgets.title: Cache Evictions

widgets.description: Query cache hit count per node (count where type=hit)
widgets.title: Cache Hit Count

widgets.description: Query cache miss count per node (count where type=miss)
widgets.title: Cache Miss Count
